name: vanguard
description: A disciplined dev-team loop for Claude Code: four specialized agents audit, critique, build, and QA each change against the real system, with safety guardrail hooks and a project-memory system.

memoryDir.title: Memory directory
memoryDir.description: Absolute path to your project-memory directory (holds projects/, identity/, memories/, known-issues/). Leave blank to default to ~/.claude/vanguard-memory.
